title: SLO
description: Workload-facing Service Level Objective. Distinct from the control-plane SLOs in docs/roadmap/deployment.md (which measure FDAI itself); this schema describes the SLIs / objectives / error budgets of the workloads FDAI operates on, so incident priority and change-freeze decisions can be ranked by real user impact. Design contract: docs/roadmap/sre-agent-scope.md § 3.3.

objective_ratio.description: Target compliance fraction over the rolling window, e.g. 0.999 = 99.9% good events.

good_query.description: Vendor-specific query (KQL, PromQL, LogQL) that counts `good` events.

total_query.description: Vendor-specific query that counts total valid events. Ratio = good / total.

labels.description: CSP-neutral pre-filter passed to the MetricProvider layer 6 seam.

burn_rate_alerts.description: Multi-window multi-burn-rate alerts per Google SRE Ch. 5. A burn-rate alert fires when BOTH windows exceed the threshold; the short window catches fast burns, the long window suppresses noise on transient spikes.
